name: ella-project
description: Root orchestration for ELLA Project (ASP.NET Core + Angular)

scripts.help:
node -e "console.log('
\x1b[32m\x1b[1mELLA Project - Developer Commands\x1b[0m
===================================

\x1b[33m\x1b[1m🛠️  First Time Setup\x1b[0m
  \x1b[36mnpm run setup\x1b[0m
      \x1b[2m• Run this once when you clone the repo.
      • Installs dependencies for Root, Frontend & Backend (restore).\x1b[0m

\x1b[33m\x1b[1m🚀 Daily Workflow\x1b[0m
  \x1b[36mnpm start\x1b[0m
      \x1b[2m• Cleans & Rebuilds Backend (regenerating OpenAPI JSON).
      • Syncs TypeScript models (Frontend).
      • Starts Backend (Watch Mode) & Frontend (Serve Mode) in parallel.\x1b[0m

\x1b[33m\x1b[1m🔄 Code Generation\x1b[0m
  \x1b[36mnpm run refresh:models\x1b[0m
      \x1b[2m• Use this if you changed a C# DTO but do not want to restart the whole server.
      • Runs: Clean -> Build -> Generate JSON -> Sync TS.\x1b[0m

\x1b[33m\x1b[1m📦 Deployment\x1b[0m
  \x1b[36mnpm run build:prod\x1b[0m
      \x1b[2m• INSTALLS dependencies first (Safety).
      • Compiles Angular (Production Mode) into Backend/wwwroot.
      • Publishes Backend (Release Mode) to /dist/final_app.
      • Result: A single deployable folder for Azure/IIS.\x1b[0m
')"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run frontend:install && dotnet restore Backend/Backend.csproj
scripts.//_publish_desc: UPDATED: Publish now creates the final deployable folder
scripts.//_ng_build_desc: UPDATED: Build Angular DIRECTLY into the Backends wwwroot folder
scripts.refresh:models: npm run dotnet:clean && npm run dotnet:build && npm run frontend:sync
scripts.start: npm run refresh:models && concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "cyan.bold,green.bold" "npm run dotnet:watch" "npm run frontend:serve"
scripts.//_step2: 2. Build Angular -> Puts files in Backend/wwwroot
scripts.//_step3: 3. Publish Backend -> Grabs code + wwwroot and zips it to /dist/final_app
scripts.build:prod: npm run setup && npm run frontend:build:prod && npm run dotnet:publish
